title: Threadline
summary: A production-built social timeline exercising Zustand external state, optimistic mutations, and keyed survivor identity.

journeys.title: Navigate and follow from responsive deep-linked profiles, saved posts, and an empty profile
Preserve a survivor node, focused composer, and draft across keyed prepends
Roll back an optimistic post and concurrent likes, then retry every mutation after reconnecting
Settle rapid optimistic reactions acknowledged out of order
Retain a rapid optimistic publish across initial load failure and seed recovery

faultScenarios.description: The fault=initial-load URL fails once, preserves an optimistic publish, and merges it ahead of the seed after retry.
Posts and concurrent reactions update optimistically while offline, roll back visibly, and retain an independent retry action.
Two rapid reactions complete on deliberately different delays without clobbering one another.
